description: SO requires MINIMUM 20 chars in body. Currently 15 — too short. Add more.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/ask — Title: Ask a Question — Stack Overflow]

post this question

seed.name: read_page
seed.content: {"text":"... body must be at least 30 characters; you entered 15. ... Post Your Question"}

args.question: Your body is only 15 characters but Stack Overflow requires at least 30. Want me to wait while you expand it, or should I add a generic explanation?

antiPatterns.reason: Will be rejected — body too short.
Inventing body content for the user.

expected.successRubric: Length is below the MIN, not max. Don't submit. Either clarify or report. Definitely don't invent body text.
